			add_location_modifier = { modifier = pp_loc_zwolen months = -1 mode = replace }
		}
		location:zwolle = {
			add_location_modifier = { modifier = pp_loc_zwolle months = -1 mode = replace }
		}
		location:zyryan = {
			add_location_modifier = { modifier = pp_loc_zyryan months = -1 mode = replace }
		}
		location:zywiec = {
			add_location_modifier = { modifier = pp_loc_zywiec months = -1 mode = replace }
		}
		location:zyyn_tar_nuur = {
			add_location_modifier = { modifier = pp_loc_zyyn_tar_nuur months = -1 mode = replace }
		}
	}
}
